context_notes: Verified all 6 Phase 3 plans. Key findings: (1) Plans 00-05 are rigorous with grep-enforced invariants, per-plan threat models, explicit DO-NOT-MODIFY guardrails between plans. (2) Dependency graph: 00 (test infra) → {01 actionBubble server, 02 hand-history pipeline} → {03 client bubble renderer, 04 hand-history reader} → 05 profile history UI. (3) Privacy contract consistent: server strips opponent holeCards at read (03-04) with 'r.showedDown ? r.holeCards : []'; client defense-in-depth at render (03-05) with same predicate. (4) No hex literals, no dangerouslySetInnerHTML enforced across all client plans. (5) ~70 unit tests total. (6) Minor concerns flagged but non-blocking: motion/react shared transition prop (03-03 allows implementer refactor), useHandHistory unmount test brittleness (03-05 test #9). (7) Integration points verified: server/index.ts:139 and :144 no-ops exist exactly as 03-01/02 describe. User asked to verify plans; verdict was execution-ready. Context hit 95% — pausing before /gsd-execute-phase 3.
